rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF FREDDIE PATRICK WILLIAMS JR
rulings.Calendar Matter: PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. 1. Petition needs to be amended to allege a specific period for which administration need to be continued. PC sec. 12201(a). LRSF 14.35.J.(2). 2. Amended Petition to specify "Third" report in its caption. CRC 7.102. 3. Even though petition includes some accounting information, this petition is treated as report of status of administration. 4. Need Schedule B of Receipt. 5. Need Schedule C of disbursements. 6. Proposed order must be submitted before hearing. LRSF 14.7.A. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF RUTHIE MAE BISHOP
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The following issues to be cleared: 1. Petition must assert that Shiela has the authority to receive Donald's share on his behalf, and the name of the distribute should identify the name of the document, too. Second Supplemental Declaration filed 11/1/23 merely states Power of Attorney, Shiela Griffin Bishop, which appears insufficient. (a) The court needs a copy of the Power of Attorney and (b) Specific information of which section of the document authorizes Sheila to receive distribution on behalf of Donald. (c) Petition and proposed order to include the specific information (the name of the document and authority). 2. Petition must identify the accurate name of the special needs trust for the benefit of Jamie Bishop (Administrator). A copy of the Certificate of Trust and/or an acceptance of the trusteeship (or similar) to be provided. The petition is the first document addressing Jamie's non-outright distribution, and no detailed information has been provided. 3. Petition also needs to provide an authority under which the court can grant distribution of Jamie's share to another entity (a special needs trust) instead of outright to the individual heir. 4. A new proposed order to be submitted. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF VICK DAVID LEE
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 12/05/2023 (no earlier date available). 1) No proposed order has been received or lodged. 2) The estate cash on hand exceeds the FDIC limit. A proof must be filed that the cash is fully insured or invested as authorized by section 10533(a)(2). 3) The calculation of statutory compensation is incorrect. 4) The attorney's declaration in support of additional compensation for extraordinary services, including a CRC 7.702 statement, must be filed. 5) Supporting time records for the attorney's ordinary services must also be filed.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ROBERT KENTON KISTLER
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 12/13/2023 (Wed). The following issues to be cleared two weeks prior to the next hearing: (1) Need clarification of the statutory compensation at 2% calculation (2% of $34,567.70 = $691.35) (2) Need clarification on whether the omitted spouse's shares would/should have included all personal properties that were previously distributed, too. Paragraph #34 alleges that the omitted spouse is entitled to 50% of the current balance of $177,737.25 only (before deducting KTM Duke value). If all beneficiaries are in agreement, written consents to the distribution need to be filed. LRSF 14.35.A. (3) Need the date of birth of Lucas who is reportedly a minor beneficiary. Proposed distribution does not identify who would receive his share until he attain majority. If Lucas is still under the age of 18, petition needs to propose proper distribution to a minor beneficiary. (4) Upon clearing the issues, proposed order to be updated. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF VICTORIA C. DRAYTON
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Determine Entitlement To Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The following issues must be addressed: 1) No proposed order has been received or lodged. 2) A copy of the remote appearance information required by LRSF 14.1(C)(6) must be attached to and served with the DE-120 form at least 15 days before the hearing. 3) Please confirm whether there was any mortgage on the estate real property at the time of the predeceased spouse's death. 4) Has the estate real property been sold? If so, please state the amount of cash currently held by the estate. 5) All the persons having legal custody of and residing with Ean Foster (minor) must be identified and receive a separate copy of notice. Direct notice must also be given to the minor. CRC 7.51(d). 6) Patrice Green's address listed on the proof of service is slightly different from the address set forth on Exhibit A attached to the petition. 7) A proof must be filed to establish a parent-child relationship as to each unidentified child of Henry Lucas and Peter Drayton. 8) A declaration required by CRC 7.52(a) must be filed to show efforts made to locate each unidentified child of Henry Lucas and Peter Drayton. Whether notice can be prescribed in any manner other than mailing (telephone, e-mail, social media, etc.) must also be addressed. CRC 7.52(c). 9) Please explain why no share is allocated to each unidentified child of Peter Drayton.

rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Hearing for the sole purpose of admitting the will. No appearance required. Status on close of the estate is set for 01/07/2025.
